sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91793" key="puro/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree">*<orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρόν</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n91793.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πυρά, τά</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυρόξανθος</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πυρρόξανθος</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
